SNECKO-LOADED_DIE.title: Loaded Die
SNECKO-LOADED_DIE.description: Whenever a card is Muddled, gain 1 Block.
SNECKO-LUCKY_HORSESHOE.title: Lucky Horseshoe
SNECKO-LUCKY_HORSESHOE.description: Upon pickup, choose 1 of 3 Characters. Choose 3 Upgraded Uncommon cards and 2 Rare cards to add to your deck. All combats drop an additional card reward of the chosen character's cards.
SNECKO-MYSTICAL_OCTAHEDRON.title: Mystical Octahedron
SNECKO-MYSTICAL_OCTAHEDRON.description: Upon pickup, choose a card that has an Overflow effect. Whenever you play it, gain 4 Block and activate its Overflow effect, even if you don't have more than 5 cards in hand.
SNECKO-MYSTICAL_OCTAHEDRON.flavor: It appears weighted toward one side.
SNECKO-RARE_BOOSTER_BOX.title: Rare Booster Box
SNECKO-RARE_BOOSTER_BOX.description: Upon pickup, obtain an Offclass Rare card.
SNECKO-RING_OF_THE_SNEK.title: Ring of the Snek
SNECKO-RING_OF_THE_SNEK.description: Whenever you activate 3 Overflow effects, apply 1 Weak and Vulnerable to a random enemy.
SNECKO-SEAL_OF_APPROVAL.title: Seal of Approval
SNECKO-SEAL_OF_APPROVAL.description: Upon pickup, choose 1 of 5 Uncommon Offclass {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Power|Powers}} to obtain.
SNECKO-SEAL_OF_APPROVAL.flavor: I'm The Ironclad and this is my favorite Relic in the Spire. -Merchant Advertising Pamphlet
SNECKO-SLEEVED_ACE.title: Sleeved Ace
SNECKO-SLEEVED_ACE.description: At the start of each combat, gain a {{C|Marked Card|Marked Card+}}.
SNECKO-SNAKE_CHARMERS_FLUTE.title: Snake-Charmer's Flute
SNECKO-SNECKO_SOUL.title: Snecko Soul
SNECKO-SNECKO_SOUL.description: At the start of each combat, add [gold]Soul Roll[/gold] to your hand.
SNECKO-SUPER_SNECKO_SOUL.title: Super Snecko Soul
SNECKO-SUPER_SNECKO_SOUL.description: Replaces {{R|Snecko Soul}}. At the start of each combat and every other turn, gain a {{C|Soul Roll}}. On other turns, draws an additional card at the start of your turn and Muddles it.
SNECKO-UNIDENTIFIED_EGG.title: Unidentified Egg
SNECKO-UNIDENTIFIED_EGG.description: Whenever you add an Offclass card to your deck, Upgrade it. Upon pickup, Upgrade 2 random Offclass cards.
SNECKO-UNIDENTIFIED_EGG.flavor: What will hatch? Pay $1000 to see.
